## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and competitor analysis for payment solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [46 articles ready for review; 8 new articles to be delivered this week](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Google's reporting issues causing data volatility; current performance metrics unreliable](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Competitor comparison articles being developed; list of competitors refined](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Need to develop detailed personas to tailor content more effectively](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review Process

  - [46 articles ready for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [8 new articles to be delivered this week](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [6 articles published last week](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [New columns added in Airtable: "Rapid Internal Reviewer" and "Good for Social"](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [List of internal reviewers to be compiled and added to Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Performance Updates

  - [Google Search Console (GSC) and GA4 data unreliable due to recent Google updates](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Traffic seems to be maintaining near all-time high levels](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [542 non-branded keywords in first position (data potentially unreliable)](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [LLM traffic slightly down from previous week's peak](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Perplexity remains highest LLM referrer, followed by GPT](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Scrunch tool implementation for AI/LLM observability (results expected in 2-3 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)

### Competitor Analysis for Payment Solutions

  - [Refined list of competitors: Adyen, PayPal, Stripe, Nuvei, WorldPay (FIS), Trust Payments, Payable, Thunes](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Shifting focus from "payment processing" to broader "payment solutions"](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Template created for comparison articles, including dimensions like onboarding approval rate and speed, security features, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Processing fees discussion to be minimized due to industry-specific pricing complexities](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Prioritizing stablecoin and competitor articles](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [LATAM articles and refreshes of older content in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
  - [Need to develop detailed personas to tailor content more effectively](https://fathom.video/share/CeUbXxAe-TysFuDj92rHAJ6bfykbm6aH?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
